0.text: Ground glass opacities in both lungs

1.text: Consolidation in multilobar, multisegmental upper lobes

2.text: Linear subsegmental atelectatic changes in right middle lobe

3.text: Linear subsegmental atelectatic changes in left upper lobe

4.text: Linear subsegmental atelectatic changes in inferior lingular segment

5.text: Linear subsegmental atelectatic changes in lower lobe basal segments

6.text: Segmentary and subsegmental peribronchial thickening in both lungs

7.text: Several nonspecific nodules in both lungs
